untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific after-hours events (earnings announcements, press releases) which are not available as technical indicators. The gap opening itself can be detected via open vs prev_close comparison, but the causal event trigger (earnings/press release timing) cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators.
translation_notes: Translated the gap opening component as open > prev_close (upside gap) or open < prev_close (downside gap). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the trade direction depends on gap direction. Exit condition uses same-day reversal as proxy since author did not specify. The event causation (earnings/press releases after hours) requires external event data not representable in the technical indicator constraint set.
